failedAssertions.reason: Remote get_spikes did not return hosted API spike data as expected (auth/read path mismatch observed).
Unreachable API returned descriptive text but not as JSON-RPC error (result payload contained ERROR text).
HTTP + --remote did not return hosted API get_spikes data (same remote read failure reproduced over HTTP).

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: MCP HTTP + Remote section for namespaced credentials, command-scoped SPIKES_TOKEN, and HTTP/remote evidence capture requirements.
Added known quirk that MCP create_share may normalize/truncate requested names and append suffixes; validations should assert against returned slug/URL.
